description: The certified lockstep set: these tool versions were verified TOGETHER (walkabout + headless fixture gates + LF fast suite, 2026-07-15). Tools stay standalone repos with their own semver; this manifest pins the combination. Check with: level-factory verify-manifest --factory <this dir>.
